description_long: This is a single-propeller, fixed-wing airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a classic taildragger configuration. The wings are straight and mounted low on the fuselage, extending symmetrically from either side. The nose features a prominent propeller and a rounded engine cowling, both colored in a muted red tone. The cockpit is positioned just behind the engine, enclosed with a clear canopy, and appears to be designed for a single pilot. The tail section includes a vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with the rear wheel located beneath the tail. The overall color scheme is a light gray with muted red accents on the nose, wingtips, and tail surfaces.
description: A light gray, single-propeller airplane with low-mounted straight wings, a taildragger landing gear, and muted red accents on the nose and tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, rounded nose, and symmetrical low-mounted wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cockpit canopy, wing profile, and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the rear wheel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the propeller, cockpit, and tail features.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear and a single rear tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
